description: Read the last paragraph of the Background section of 'Attention Is All You Need', find the 3 cited papers, and create academic summaries.
prompt:
I am a PhD student studying natural language processing, and I want to deeply understand the foundational references behind the Transformer. The paper "Attention Is All You Need" (Vaswani et al., 2017) is provided as attention_is_all_you_need.pdf. Please read the last paragraph of the Background section — it cites 3 key papers. Find these 3 papers and write a 300-500 word academic summary for each, covering: the paper's core contribution, methodology overview, and its relationship to the Transformer.

Generate reference_summary.docx containing: a title, an introduction explaining the inspirations behind the Transformer, one section per paper (Heading 2), and a summary comparison table at the end. The document must end with a "References" section listing all 3 cited papers in APA format (Author, A. B. (Year). Title. Journal/Conference, Volume, Pages.). In the body text, use APA in-text citations such as (Kaiser & Sutskever, 2016) when referring to each paper.
